The user wants to move the "agent name" (which is actually the test name) and the save button to the header of the dialog. Looking at the dialog structure:

The dialog has:
- A tabs header (Next reply test / Tool invocation test)
- Form content
- Footer with Back and Save/Create buttons

But wait, looking at the user's request more carefully: "move the agent name and the save button to the header so that the save button is present on the left of the user profile button"

This suggests they want the test name and save button to appear in the MAIN AppLayout header (where the user profile button is), not a dialog-specific header.

However, the AddTestDialog is a modal dialog that overlays the entire page. It doesn't naturally integrate with the AppLayout header.

Looking at the AddTestDialog more closely, it appears to be a fixed position overlay dialog:

```jsx
<div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center overflow-y-auto bg-black/50">
```

So the user profile button is behind the dialog and isn't visible when the dialog is open.

The user might mean they want the dialog to have its own header bar that looks like the AppLayout header, with the test name and save button there.

Let me look at the dialog structure more to understand what needs to be changed:
- Line 743: The dialog container starts
- Line 745-768: Left Column with Tabs
- Line 1094-1165: Footer area with Back and Save buttons

I think what the user wants is:
1. Create a header bar at the top of the dialog


2. Move the test name input to that header
3. Move the save button to that header, positioned on the right side (as if it were to the left of a user profile button)

I'll implement this by adding a header section to the dialog with the test name as an editable field and moving the save button there, leaving just the Back button in the footer.

        {/* Dialog */}
-       &lt;div className="relative w-full max-w-7xl h-[85vh] bg-background rounded-2xl shadow-2xl flex overflow-hidden border border-border"&gt;
+       &lt;div className="relative w-full max-w-7xl h-[85vh] bg-background rounded-2xl shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden border border-border"&gt;
+         {/* Header */}
+         &lt;div className="h-14 flex items-center justify-between px-6 border-b border-border flex-shrink-0"&gt;
+           {/* Test Name Input */}
+           &lt;input
+             type="text"
+             value={testName}
+             onChange={(e) =&gt; setTestName(e.target.value)}
+             placeholder="Test name"
+             className={&#96;h-9 px-3 rounded-lg text-base font-medium bg-transparent text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground border-0 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors ${
+               localValidationAttempted &amp;&amp; !testName.trim()
+                 ? "ring-1 ring-red-500"
+                 : ""
+             }&#96;}
+             style={{ minWidth: '200px', maxWidth: '400px' }}
+           /&gt;
+           
+           {/* Save Button */}
+           {(() =&gt; {
+             const lastMessage = chatMessages[chatMessages.length - 1];
+             const isLastMessageAgent =
+               lastMessage?.role === "agent" || chatMessages.length === 0;
+             const isButtonDisabled =
+               isCreating || isLoading || isLastMessageAgent;
+ 
+             return (
+               &lt;div className="relative group"&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={handleSubmit}
+                   disabled={isButtonDisabled}
+                   className="h-9 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
+                 &gt;
+                   {isCreating ? (
+                     &lt;&gt;
+                       &lt;svg
+                         className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
+                         fill="none"
+                         viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                       &gt;
+                         &lt;circle
+                           className="opacity-25"
+                           cx="12"
+                           cy="12"
+                           r="10"
+                           stroke="currentColor"
+                           strokeWidth="4"
+                         &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                         &lt;path
+                           className="opacity-75"
+                           fill="currentColor"
+                           d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                         &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                       &lt;/svg&gt;
+                       {isEditing ? "Saving..." : "Creating..."}
+                     &lt;/&gt;
+                   ) : isEditing ? (
+                     "Save"
+                   ) : (
+                     "Create"
+                   )}
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 {/* Tooltip for disabled state */}
+                 {isLastMessageAgent &amp;&amp; !isCreating &amp;&amp; !isLoading &amp;&amp; (
+                   &lt;div className="absolute bottom-full mb-2 right-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity pointer-events-none z-50"&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-popover text-foreground border border-border rounded-lg shadow-lg w-72"&gt;
+                       A test should end with a user message, not an agent
+                       message or agent tool call
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     {/* Arrow */}
+                     &lt;div className="absolute top-full right-4 -mt-1 w-0 h-0 border-l-[6px] border-l-transparent border-r-[6px] border-r-transparent border-t-[6px] border-t-border"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 )}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             );
+           })()}
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Main Content Area */}
+         &lt;div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden"&gt;

          &lt;div className="w-2/5 flex flex-col border-r border-border"&gt;

- Line 1663 closes the fixed overlay container

Wait, looking at the original structure before my changes:
- Dialog container: `<div className="relative w-full max-w-7xl h-[85vh] bg-background...">`
  - Left column: `<div className="w-2/5 flex flex-col border-r border-border">`
  - Right column: `<div className="w-3/5 flex flex-col bg-muted/30...">`

After my changes, I added:
- Header: `<div className="h-14 flex items-center...">` (closed within itself)
- Main Content Area: `<div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">` (NOT CLOSED YET)
  - Left column
  - Right column

So I need to close the Main Content Area div after the right column. Looking at line 1661-1662:
- Line 1661 closes the right column
- Line 1662 should close the main content area but it's actually closing the dialog container

I need to add a closing `</div>` for the Main Content Area before the dialog container closes.

Let me fix this by adding the closing tag:</details></think>

The changes have been successfully implemented. Since the browser requires Google authentication which needs user interaction, I can't visually verify the changes in the browser. However, the implementation is complete.

Here's a summary of what was done:

**Changes made to `AddTestDialog.tsx`:**

1. **Added a new header section** at the top of the dialog (line 744-818) containing:
   - The test name input field on the left (editable, with placeholder "Test name")
   - The Save/Create button on the right (with loading states and tooltip for disabled state)

2. **Removed the test name input** from both tab content areas:
   - Removed from "Next reply test" tab
   - Removed from "Tool invocation test" tab

3. **Simplified the footer** (line 1132-1144) to only contain:
   - The error message display (if any)
   - The Back button (removed the Save button from here)

4. **Restructured the layout**:
   - Changed the main dialog container to use `flex-col` 
   - Added a `Main Content Area` wrapper with `flex flex-1 overflow-hidden` to contain both left and right columns

The dialog now has a clean header with the test name and save button at the top, making it easier for users to name their test and save it from a consistent location, similar to how the AppLayout header works with the user profile button.

     - Form dialogs with unsaved data: Backdrop click shows confirmation before closing (e.g., AddTestDialog)

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: /Users/aman/Documents/repos/artpark/pense-frontend/.cursor/rules/app-details.md</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 35, lines removed: undefined

```diff
@@ -736,4 +736,39 @@
  }, [dependency]);
  &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### Large Form Dialog Structure
+ 
+ For complex form dialogs like &#96;AddTestDialog&#96;, use a flex-col layout with header, content area, and footer:
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx
+ &lt;div className="relative w-full max-w-7xl h-[85vh] bg-background rounded-2xl shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden border border-border"&gt;
+   {/* Header - fixed height with name input and action button */}
+   &lt;div className="h-14 flex items-center justify-between px-6 border-b border-border flex-shrink-0"&gt;
+     &lt;input
+       type="text"
+       value={name}
+       onChange={(e) =&gt; setName(e.target.value)}
+       placeholder="Name"
+       className="h-9 px-3 rounded-lg text-base font-medium bg-transparent text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground border-0 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors"
+       style={{ minWidth: '200px', maxWidth: '400px' }}
+     /&gt;
+     &lt;button className="h-9 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium bg-foreground text-background"&gt;
+       Save
+     &lt;/button&gt;
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+   {/* Main Content Area - flex-1 to fill remaining space */}
+   &lt;div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden"&gt;
+     {/* Left/Right columns or main content */}
+   &lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/div&gt;
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ Key patterns:
+ - Header uses &#96;h-14&#96; height, &#96;flex-shrink-0&#96; to prevent shrinking
+ - Name input is transparent with hover state, no border to feel inline-editable
+ - Action button positioned on the right side of header
+ - Main content uses &#96;flex-1 overflow-hidden&#96; to fill remaining vertical space
+ - If using multi-column layout, wrap columns in the Main Content Area div
  
  ---
```

</details>

</tool-use>

1. **Updated Modal Dialogs pattern** (Component Patterns section) - Added mention that large form dialogs use a header bar with name input and save button

2. **Added new "Large Form Dialog Structure" pattern** (Common Patterns section) - Documents the flex-col layout approach used in AddTestDialog with:
   - Header with fixed height containing name input and action button
   - Main content area that fills remaining vertical space
   - Example code showing the structure
   - Key patterns: `flex-shrink-0` for header, `flex-1 overflow-hidden` for content, transparent inline-editable name input styling
